title: Complete and save an athlete evaluation
description: This test verifies that a coach can select an athlete, complete all evaluation dimensions and comments, and save the evaluation successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /avaliar
Select an age category
Select an athlete
Fill in the technical score field with a valid value
Fill in the tactical score field with a valid value
Fill in the physical score field with a valid value
Fill in the behavioral score field with a valid value
Fill in the comments field with evaluation notes
Save the evaluation
Verify the evaluation is saved
Verify the completed evaluation is visible

title: Update an athlete status from the profile
description: This test verifies that a user can change an athlete's status from the profile and see the updated status take effect.

steps.description: Navigate to /atletas
Open an athlete from the roster
Select a new status for the athlete
Verify the updated status is displayed in the profile
Verify the status change controls remain available

title: Search and filter the roster to find athletes
description: This test verifies that a user can narrow the roster with search and filters and see the list update accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /atletas
Type a valid athlete name fragment into the search field
Select a category filter
Select a status filter
Verify the roster list is narrowed to matching athletes
Verify the selected filters are reflected in the roster view

title: Create a training session and mark attendance
description: This test verifies that a user can create a training session and mark athlete attendance from the session detail view.
category: training session creation and attendance marking

steps.description: Navigate to /treinos
Open the training session creation flow
Fill in the required session details with valid values
Save the training session
Open the created training session details
Mark attendance for at least one athlete
Verify the session details are displayed
Verify attendance is recorded in the session view

title: Open core areas from the dashboard and return
description: This verifies that a user can start from the dashboard, jump into a core workflow area, and return to the dashboard through navigation.
category: Dashboard overview and navigation to core areas

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the roster area from the dashboard
Return to the dashboard through navigation
Verify the dashboard is displayed again
Verify core navigation options are available

title: Create a match and update match status
description: This test verifies that a user can create a match, open its details, and change the game status while viewing the tactical information.
category: match creation and match status/tactical updates

steps.description: Navigate to /jogos
Open the match creation flow
Fill in the required match details with valid values
Save the match
Open the created match details
Update the match status
Verify the match details are displayed
Verify tactical board or match stats are visible

title: View dashboard overview and open a core area
description: This test verifies that a user can review the main dashboard metrics and use a quick action to reach a core management area.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the dashboard metrics and upcoming activity area
Open a quick action for a core management area
Verify the destination area is displayed
Verify dashboard metrics are still accessible in the interface

title: Create a training session
description: This verifies that a user can open the training creator, enter session details, submit them, and see the new session in the training list.

steps.description: Navigate to /treinos
Open the new training flow
Enter valid training details
Submit the session
Verify the new training session appears in the list
Verify the session is available to open from the list

title: Open an athlete profile from the roster
description: This test verifies that a user can open a roster entry and reach the athlete profile page with detailed information.

steps.description: Navigate to /atletas
Open an athlete from the roster
Verify the athlete profile is displayed
Verify personal and physical details are visible

title: Create a match
description: This verifies that a user can open the match creator, enter match details, submit them, and see the new match in the match list.

steps.description: Navigate to /jogos
Open the new match flow
Enter valid match details
Submit the match
Verify the new match appears in the match list
Verify the match is available to open from the list

title: Mark athlete attendance in a training session
description: This verifies that a user can open a training session, review the participant list, and update attendance status for athletes.

steps.description: Navigate to /treinos
Open a training session from the list
Review the participant list
Toggle attendance for an athlete
Verify the athlete attendance status updates in the session details
Verify the updated attendance state remains visible

title: Prevent saving an incomplete evaluation
description: This test verifies that the evaluation form does not save when required score dimensions are missing and that validation is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /avaliar
Select an age category
Select an athlete
Fill in only part of the required score fields
Attempt to save the evaluation
Verify a validation error is visible
Verify the evaluation is not saved

title: Update match status from match details
description: This verifies that a user can open a match, review tactical information and stats, and change the match status from the detail view.

steps.description: Navigate to /jogos
Open a match from the list
Review the match stats and tactical board
Update the match status
Verify the match status updates in the detail view
Verify the tactical and stats sections remain visible

title: Open highlighted activity from the dashboard
description: This test verifies that a user can read the upcoming activity summary from the dashboard and open the highlighted activity for management.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the upcoming activity summary
Open the management action for the highlighted activity
Verify the selected activity management view is displayed
Verify the activity details are visible

title: Register a new athlete and open the profile
description: This test verifies that a user can add a new athlete through the roster flow and then access the newly created profile.

steps.description: Navigate to /atletas
Open the new athlete registration flow
Fill in the athlete registration form with valid details
Save the new athlete
Open the newly created athlete from the roster
Verify the new athlete profile is displayed
Verify the roster now includes the new athlete

title: Review the training list and open a session detail
description: This test verifies that a user can browse training sessions and open an individual session for details and feedback.
category: training session creation and attendance marking

steps.description: Navigate to /treinos
Scroll through the training list
Open a session from the list
Verify the session detail view is displayed
Verify session feedback or attendance information is visible

title: Review athlete performance history and charts
description: This test verifies that a user can inspect an athlete profile and view performance charts together with progress history.

steps.description: Navigate to /atletas
Open an athlete from the roster
Scroll to the performance section
Verify performance charts are displayed
Verify progress history entries are visible

title: Review match details, tactics, and stats
description: This test verifies that a user can browse the match list, open a match, and inspect the tactical board and stats.
category: match creation and match status/tactical updates

steps.description: Navigate to /jogos
Scroll through the match list
Open a match from the list
Verify the match detail view is displayed
Verify match stats and tactical board are visible

title: Filter athletes by age category before evaluating
description: This verifies that selecting an age category narrows the athlete roster used for evaluation.

steps.description: Navigate to /avaliar
Select an athlete’s age category
Verify the athlete roster is filtered to the selected age category
Verify athletes from other categories are not shown

title: Browse match list and open match details
description: This verifies that a user can browse scheduled and completed matches and open one to inspect its details.

steps.description: Navigate to /jogos
Verify matches are displayed
Open a match from the list
Verify the match detail view is displayed

title: Browse training sessions and open session details
description: This verifies that a user can browse the training list and open an individual session to review its details.

steps.description: Navigate to /treinos
Verify training sessions are displayed
Open a training session from the list
Verify the session detail view is displayed

title: Show empty roster and list edge states
description: This test verifies that the roster, training, or match list pages show an empty state when no items are available to display.

steps.description: Navigate to /atletas
Apply filters that result in no matching athletes
Verify an empty state message is visible
Verify no roster items are shown
